extensionDescription.message: Expose your own Chrome browser as an MCP service

clearDataList3.description: Third item in clear data list

clearDataIrreversibleWarning.message: This operation is irreversible! After clearing, you need to browse webpages again to rebuild the index.

popupRemoteConfigHint.message: Enable Remote Access to view MCP configuration for remote clients.

popupConfigNeedsConnection.description: Placeholder hint before connection is ready

popupRemoteEnabledWithToken.message: Remote access enabled; default token generated

popupRemoteSecurityWarning.message: Remote mode requires Bearer Token. A default token is being created automatically, or generate one manually in Token Management.

popupRemoteSummaryEnabledSecure.message: Remote enabled (0.0.0.0), LAN clients connect with Token.

popupStatusDetailConnectedNoService.message: Native host is connected, but local MCP service is not ready. Click Refresh first; if it still fails, run `tabrix doctor` and reload extension.

popupStatusDetailDisconnected.message: If Connect still fails, run `tabrix doctor --fix` and `tabrix register --force`, then fully restart Chrome.

popupStatusDetailDisconnectedWhileDaemon.message: Local service is running, but browser channel is not connected. Click Connect to enable automation.

popupStatusDetailErrorDefault.message: Last connection error: $ARG1$. Try `tabrix doctor --fix`, then `tabrix register --force`, then fully restart Chrome and reload extension in chrome://extensions/.

popupTabHintLocal.message: For local clients like Cursor / Claude Desktop / CherryStudio / Windsurf

popupTabHintRemote.message: For remote hosts or Docker via LAN IP

popupTabHintStdio.message: For CLI clients like Claude Code CLI (npm i -g tabrix@latest first)

popupTroubleshootDaemonStartTitle.message: Start daemon (keep service online without browser)

popupTroubleshootingGuideDesc.message: Run these commands in order. Then fully restart Chrome and reload the extension in chrome://extensions/.

popupTroubleshootRemotePersistNote.message: Use the Remote tab toggle by default. This command is only for daemon-based persistent remote mode.

sidepanelNavigatorTriggerTitle.message: Switch pages (drag to move, double-click to reset position)

tokenPageEmptyLocalOnly.message: Local-only mode is active. Remote token is optional. Enable remote access to generate one here.

tokenPageEmptyRemoteEnabled.message: No available token detected. Click "Generate default token" (default 7 days) before copying remote config.

tokenPageEnvTokenBadge.message: Provided by MCP_AUTH_TOKEN environment variable (cannot be refreshed here)

tokenPageLocalServiceUnavailable.message: Token service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry.

tokenPageNotesText.message: You can set token validity days in the regenerate dialog. MCP_AUTH_TOKEN_TTL still controls default days on first auto-generation (default 7; 0 means never expire). Restart service after changing env vars.

tokenPageRefreshConfirmMessage.message: The old token will expire immediately. MCP clients on other devices must update Authorization. Set validity days for the new token below.

tokenPageRegenerateConfirmItem.message: Saved new token or confirmed all clients can be updated now

sidepanelTriggerCreateNotImplemented.message: V3 Trigger management is not implemented yet, cannot create trigger for now.

sidepanelTriggerEditNotImplemented.message: V3 Trigger management is not implemented yet, cannot edit trigger for now.

sidepanelWorkflowCreateNotImplemented.message: V3 Builder is not implemented yet, cannot create workflow for now.

sidepanelWorkflowDeleteConfirm.message: Delete this workflow? This action cannot be undone.

sidepanelWorkflowEditNotImplemented.message: V3 Builder is not implemented yet, cannot edit workflow for now.

builderFlowNotFound.message: Workflow "$ARG1$" not found; created a new workflow

builderImportNoFlow.message: Import failed: no workflow data found

builderScheduleConvertFailed.message: Node $ARG1$ schedule #$ARG2$: cannot convert to cron (type=$ARG3$), skipped

builderScheduleOnceUnsupported.message: Node $ARG1$ schedule #$ARG2$: one-time schedule (once) is not supported in V3, skipped

triggerCommandHint.message: Tip: Chrome extension shortcuts must be declared in manifest and cannot be added dynamically at runtime.

triggerCommandLabel.message: Command key (must be declared in manifest commands)

triggerDescriptionPlaceholder.message: Describe what this trigger is for

triggerSummaryNote.message: Note: Triggers are synced to background trigger registry (URL/context menu/shortcut/DOM) and schedules (interval/daily/once) when saving workflow.

builderPropDragHint.message: Tip: path is usually auto-generated during recording; you can leave it empty when creating manually.

builderPropHttpFormDataLabel.message: FormData (JSON, optional, overrides Body when provided)

builderPropIfDescription.message: Define branches using expressions, with variables and common comparison operators.

builderPropIfElseDescription.message: Else branch (no expression; matches when all above conditions are false)

builderPropScreenshotSelectorPlaceholder.message: Leave empty to capture viewport or full page

builderPropSetAttrValueLabel.message: Attribute value (leave empty and check remove to delete)

builderPropSpecNotFoundHint.message: No NodeSpec provided for this node yet; fallback default property panel is used.

builderPropSwitchFrameHint.message: Available for same-origin/injectable frames; leave empty to return to top-level page

builderFieldSelectorHelp.message: You can enter a CSS selector, or click Pick to select an element on the page

builderFieldSelectorNoValidSelectorError.message: No valid selector generated, please input manually

popupNativeGuidanceForbiddenDiagnosis.message: Diagnosis: current extension ID is not in Native Messaging manifest.allowed_origins, or registry still points to an old manifest.

popupNativeGuidanceForbiddenSuggestion.message: Suggestion: run `tabrix doctor --fix`; if it still fails, run `tabrix register --force`, then fully restart Chrome and reload extension in chrome://extensions/.

popupNativeGuidanceHostMissingDiagnosis.message: Diagnosis: Native host is not registered, path is invalid, or host startup failed.

popupNativeGuidanceHostMissingSuggestion.message: Suggestion: run `tabrix doctor --fix`; if needed, run `tabrix register --force`.

popupNativeGuidanceAuthDiagnosis.message: Diagnosis: remote access token is missing, expired, or mismatched.

popupNativeGuidanceAuthSuggestion.message: Suggestion: refresh/copy token in Popup > Remote, and configure Authorization header in your MCP client.

popupNativeGuidanceUnknownSuggestion.message: Suggestion: run `tabrix doctor --fix`; if it still fails, run `tabrix register --force`, then fully restart Chrome.

webEditorPropsEarlyInjectionConfirm.message:
Props editing requires early injection to capture React renderers before they initialize.

This will:
• Register a content script for this site
• Reload the page immediately

After reload, enable the editor again to access full Props functionality.

Continue?
